summary: This cluster focuses on the taxonomy and biodiversity of the genus *Euglena* in freshwater environments, specifically within Korean ecosystems. Researchers conducted a floristic survey across 58 sites, identifying 31 species through morphological analysis and Zakrys’ taxonomic framework. The work documented 12 new taxa for the region, including *Euglena archacoplastidiata* and *Euglena caudata*, expanding the known distribution of these euglenoids in East Asia. The findings underscore the utility of classical morphological keys for resolving species-level diversity in *Euglena* from temperate freshwater habitats.
